provenance.source_corpus: Are hatchery-reared abalone naïve of predators? Comparing the behaviours of wild and hatchery-reared northern abalone, Haliotis kamtschatkana (Jonas, 1845)

nodes.name: vulnerability of hatchery-reared abalone to predators

source_spans.text: vulnerability of hatchery-reared abalone to predators

edges.subject: causal_mosaic:node:784d1837a3a0
edges.original_sentence: In the field, outplanted hatchery-reared abalone were significantly less responsive than wild abalone, in terms of number of abalone responding and intensity of response, to nearby movement and to physical contact with an inert probe.

source_spans.text: In the field, outplanted hatchery-reared abalone were significantly less responsive than wild abalone, in terms of number of abalone responding and intensity of response, to nearby movement and to physical contact with an inert probe.

source_document.title: Are hatchery-reared abalone naïve of predators? Comparing the behaviours of wild and hatchery-reared northern abalone, Haliotis kamtschatkana (Jonas, 1845)

edges.subject: causal_mosaic:node:96421989e578
edges.original_sentence: These behavioural differences are expected to increase the vulnerability of hatchery-reared abalone to predators

source_spans.text: These behavioural differences are expected to increase the vulnerability of hatchery-reared abalone to predators

source_document.title: Are hatchery-reared abalone naïve of predators? Comparing the behaviours of wild and hatchery-reared northern abalone, Haliotis kamtschatkana (Jonas, 1845)

edges.subject: causal_mosaic:node:96421989e578
edges.original_sentence: These behavioural differences are expected to increase the vulnerability of hatchery-reared abalone to predators, and are likely a major cause of their elevated predator-induced mortality when outplanted.

source_spans.text: These behavioural differences are expected to increase the vulnerability of hatchery-reared abalone to predators, and are likely a major cause of their elevated predator-induced mortality when outplanted.

source_document.title: Are hatchery-reared abalone naïve of predators? Comparing the behaviours of wild and hatchery-reared northern abalone, Haliotis kamtschatkana (Jonas, 1845)

edges.subject: causal_mosaic:node:cffc53b5fa4a
edges.original_sentence: One potential solution, the outplanting of hatchery-reared H. kamtschatkana, has so far been limited by high mortality rates of hatchery abalone when released into the wild

source_spans.text: One potential solution, the outplanting of hatchery-reared H. kamtschatkana, has so far been limited by high mortality rates of hatchery abalone when released into the wild

source_document.title: Are hatchery-reared abalone naïve of predators? Comparing the behaviours of wild and hatchery-reared northern abalone, Haliotis kamtschatkana (Jonas, 1845)
